title: Antimatter Manipulation
wikitext:
[[File:AntimatterProducts.jpg|right|400px]]

==Summary==
'''Antimatter Manipulation''' is the power to control [[Antimatter]], a material composed of [[wikipedia:antiparticles|antiparticles]]. This is an incredibly destructive power, as collisions between particles and antiparticles leads to the annihilation of both, [[Durability Negation|ignoring durability]] in the process and causing an explosive release of energy capable of eclipsing a nuclear bomb with only a small amount of antimatter.

==Users==
*[[Giratina]] ([[Pokémon]])
*[[Anti-Monitor]] ([[DC Comics]])
*[[Blue Marvel]] ([[Marvel Comics]])
*[[Yukari Yakumo]] ([[Touhou Project]])
*[[Zanuka]] ([[Warframe]])
